# gastown_crew (Resource)



## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "gastown_hq" "main" {
  path = "/home/user/gt"
}

resource "gastown_rig" "coder" {
  hq_path = gastown_hq.main.path
  name    = "coder"
  repo    = "https://github.com/user/coder-rig.git"
}

resource "gastown_crew" "helper" {
  hq_path = gastown_hq.main.path
  rig     = gastown_rig.coder.name
  name    = "helper"
  role    = "coder"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `hq_path` (String) Path to the Gas Town HQ directory.
- `name` (String) Name of the crew member.
- `rig` (String) Name of the rig this crew member belongs to.
- `role` (String) Role assigned to the crew member (e.g., 'coder', 'reviewer').

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Unique identifier for the crew resource.
